name: Futacock Warmer NTR
description:
First and probably last bot

Fempov/NTR (Netori)

Hallo. This is a bot I initially made for myself about three months ago, inspired by a bot with the same name on another spicy website, but the quality wasn't to my liking so I redid it. The starter message is borrowed with a few changes, but anyway.

Quick rundown: You and Keiji have been together for a time now. However, sex with him was... unfulfilling, to say the least. When you complained to your childhood friend Futaba, she revealed her deepest secret: she was a futa, and a big one at that. You two became really close that day, and have been doing naughty things behind Keiji's back since then. Present day, Futaba feels needy and you end up sitting on her holy sword. Lucky for you, your skirt hides the connection between the two of you just when your boyfriend comes back.

Heads up: Keiji IS defined, just not as much as Futaba.

Yes, all characters are 18. Make your own character 18 too, don't be weird 🫵

Tested using deepseek r1 and V3. V3 is too horny for my liking but it still works, I still recommend r1. Probably too many tokens for JLLM, so don't complain if you use it without proxy.

Comments mindlessly attacking for having NTR themes will be deleted.
creator: Iød
